summary: The proposal addresses previous findings effectively, introduces no new issues, and superficially addressed concerns are minimal.

findings.title: Resolution Tracking Clarity
findings.body: While the table provides a good summary of resolutions for v1 findings, inline text references should be clearer or more frequent to ensure easy tracking and validation.
findings.suggestion: Expand inline resolution texts to reinforce the table's entries.

findings.title: Consistency in Naming `config.yaml` vs `.reviewer/config.yaml`
findings.body: There is a slight inconsistency where `config.yaml` is referred to both inside and outside of `.reviewer/`, especially important for clarity around version bump check opt-out.
findings.suggestion: Ensure consistent path usage, particularly in context of configurations (e.g., explicitly use `.reviewer/config.yaml`).
